creator: kpect@protonmail.com
text:
(In reply to Adrian Chadd from comment #2)

Yes it associates as 11n, but it did the same before, on 10.3 without any issues and had good wireless speed. It works as 11n on 11.0 also, but the problem is during the initialization + that 'fatal firmware error'.

P.S. the chip is Intel Centrino Advanced-N 6205
